problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Neuromorphic. Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity directly addresses this.
